features: 🥇【HIGH-QUALITY PAPER】: The sketch pad uses 200GSM thick high-quality acid-free paper, which can effectively reduce drawing smudges, keep colors bright, ensure that it is not easy to penetrate when painting, sketching and doodling, and provide an excellent painting experience

🎨【SUFFICIENT NUMBER OF PAGES】: The sketchbook contains 100 pages (50 double-sided use), providing artists and professionals with ample creative space to meet various painting needs. Beginners of any skill level can use this drawing pad to learn and develop painting skills

🎉【SPIRAL BINDING DESIGN】: Spiral binding makes page turning smoother, convenient for recording inspiration at any time, while keeping the book flat, which is convenient for painting at any angle. The sturdy spiral binding and backing protect your work from being damaged, and you can easily tear off the paper

🎁【MULTI-PURPOSE ART DRAWING PAPER】: Suitable for a variety of drawing materials, including pencils, charcoal, watercolor, acrylic, etc., to meet the needs of different art styles, suitable for various art creations. This sketch book is very suitable for Christmas, birthdays or other festivals, as a gift for artist friends and children

🎀【PORTABLE DESIGN】: The A4 design is easy to carry, suitable for use at home, school or outdoors, enjoy the fun of creation anytime, anywhere, suitable for artists and students. You can leave your inspiration in the sketch book anytime and anywhere, such as pencil sketches, portraits, charcoal sketches, etc.
